rows.notes: The current-stage driver should expose current H19, preserved H17/H15/H14/H13/V1 state, the preserved older baselines, and the conditional compiled lane.
The planning taxonomy should make active-driver and gate ownership explicit.
The packet index should identify the canonical manuscript, appendix, control docs, and audit anchors.
The archival manifest should document regeneration commands and explicit restricted-source exclusions.
The packet should carry the machine-readable worktree snapshot as an operational commit gate without treating a dirty unattended tree as a science failure.
The review-boundary summary should preserve supported claims, blocked claims, and explicit reopen routing.
The release-note skeleton should remain restrained and explicitly downstream-only.
README, STATUS, and the publication index should all reflect the same current H19 driver and preserved packet docs.
Public packet docs other than the archive manifest should not depend on restricted-source paths.
The existing standing audits must stay green before the packet is called archive-ready.
